name: @miguelgrillo/perspective-xyflow-canvas-client
description: Client web bundle for Perspective XY Flow Canvas

scripts.clean: node -e "require('fs').rmSync('dist', { recursive: true, force: true }); require('fs').rmSync('.awcache', { recursive: true, force: true });"
scripts.deepClean: node -e "require('fs').rmSync('dist', { recursive: true, force: true }); require('fs').rmSync('.awcache', { recursive: true, force: true }); require('fs').rmSync('node_modules', { recursive: true, force: true });"
